merchants.name: Smart EX / Tokaido-Sanyo-Kyushu Shinkansen
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Register JAL CLUB EST Suica as the payment card and Mobile Suica as the boarding IC after SMBC training.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use SMBC Olive Gold Debit Mode as the Smart EX payment card when the large ticket amount is useful for 100万円修行; register Mobile Suica only as the boarding IC.

merchants.name: Sushiro / スシロー
merchants.defaultRecommendation: スシローアプリ/保有クーポンを先に確認。100万円修行中は残額をSMBC Olive Gold Debit Modeで直接支払う。PayPayクーポンがないならPayPay経由にする理由はない。
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Debit Modeで直接支払い。スマホVisaタッチでもカード現物でも100万円修行には算入されるが、スシローはSMBC対象店1.5%の対象ではないため通常0.5%扱い。
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JALカード直接決済で通常のJALマイル/LSPを優先。保有中または割安取得済みのQUOカードPayがあれば先に消化。
steps: Use Sushiro app reservation/available coupons first.
If holding a valid FOOD & LIFE shareholder voucher, apply it before payment.
Otherwise during training choose credit-card payment and use SMBC Olive Debit Mode smartphone Visa touch where supported.
Use QUO Card Pay only if already held or acquired below face value.
alternatives: QUO Card Pay at participating branches.
FOOD & LIFE shareholder voucher only if legitimately held.
PayPay only when a coupon/campaign exists or card payment is inconvenient.
warnings: スシローは現在のSMBC対象コンビニ・飲食店リストに含まれないため、デビットモードの1.5%対象ではない。
PayPayクーポン/キャンペーンがない場合、SMBCをPayPay経由にしてもメリットはない。
QUOカードPayは一部対象外店舗がある。

Pay with SMBC during 修行 or JAL after 修行 depending on goal.

merchants.defaultRecommendation: If I have au PAY Card and plan is eligible for payment discount, use au PAY Card. If I do not have au PAY Card, use SMBC Olive Gold Debit Mode during SMBC修行.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Debit Mode if no au PAY Card discount applies.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Re-evaluate based on whether au PAY Card exists and whether discount applies.

alternatives: JAL card if focusing on JAL/LSP and no au PAY Card discount.

UQ monthly payment is a stable spend source for SMBC修行.

merchants.name: USMH group supermarkets
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Use one USMH ¥100 shareholder voucher per full ¥1,000 of eligible spend, then optimize the remaining balance.

merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Apply all eligible USMH vouchers, then pay the remainder with JAL card, Mobile Suica, or the strongest campaign route.
steps: Aim for a basket total at or just above a ¥1,000 multiple when practical.
Hand vouchers to the cashier before payment.
Pay the remaining balance separately.
alternatives: Choose an eligible USMH benefit product instead of vouchers only at the shareholder-election stage, not at checkout.
warnings: Eligible chains include Maruetsu, Kasumi, Inageya and eligible AEON Food Style-operated stores, with exclusions.
Ordinary AEON stores and unrelated MaxValu operators are not automatically eligible.
Tenants and specified goods can be excluded.

商業施設内店舗など、一部対象外店舗がある。

globalRules.rule: Apply valid shareholder benefits, store coupons, and fixed-value vouchers before choosing the payment method for the remaining balance.
examples: MUJI shareholder coupon: scan MUJI App and apply 7% off first.
USMH shareholder voucher: hand over one ¥100 voucher for each full ¥1,000 of eligible spend, then pay the remainder.

globalRules.rule: At eligible MUJI stores, the 7% shareholder discount is more important than the difference between ordinary card reward rates. Always scan the MUJI App first.
At eligible USMH-group stores, plan the basket around ¥1,000 thresholds because each full ¥1,000 permits one ¥100 shareholder voucher.
SMBC対象のコンビニ・飲食店では、Olive Debit ModeのスマホVisaタッチまたは明示的に対象となるモバイルオーダーを使う。ユーザーの基準還元率は1.5%であり、8%ではない。
2026-08-31までは、100万円修行に算入される通常利用をSMBC Olive Gold Debit Modeに寄せる。ただし株主優待、強いクーポン、JAL特約店、明確に高価値なキャンペーンを優先する。
修行終了後、SMBC対象店ではDebit Modeの1.5%ルートを優先候補にする。それ以外の通常カード決済はJAL CLUB EST SuicaのJALマイル/LSPを優先し、少額はMobile Suicaも使う。
